title: ballota russeliana
intro: Ballota russeliana, also known as Russian ballota or Russian pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its carminative and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and infections. The health benefits of Ballota russeliana include relieving symptoms of menstrual cramps, headaches, and other conditions associated with hormonal imbalances. Ballota russeliana is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it may also be used in tinctures or essential oil form for its medicinal properties.
